sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114666" key="xrhsmologikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμολογ-ική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the art of divination,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
